task_completion.description: Open the source rocket design file NDRT_Rocket_2020.ork.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window is open, and the filename 'NDRT_Rocket_2020.ork' is visible in the title bar or the component tree.

task_completion.description: Customize the 3D appearance with the Red/White/Blue paint scheme.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view or appearance configuration dialogs show the Nose Cone painted red (high gloss), the main Body Tubes painted white, and the Fins painted blue.

task_completion.description: Generate a telemetry plot of Altitude and Vertical Velocity vs. Time from a flight simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A plot window or dialog is visible displaying a graph with 'Altitude' and 'Vertical Velocity' on the Y-axes and 'Time' on the X-axis.

task_completion.description: Save the telemetry plot as a PDF to /home/ga/Documents/exports/telemetry_plot.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal shows the file 'telemetry_plot.pdf' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/exports/' directory.
A photo export dialog showing 1920x1080 resolution settings, or a file manager showing 'rocket_render.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Save the updated design file to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/pr_rocket.ork.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager shows 'pr_rocket.ork' in the '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/' directory, or the application title bar is updated to 'pr_rocket.ork'.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to customize the rocket and generate outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenRocket GUI open with appearance configuration dialogs, plot generation windows, and export dialogs, rather than just terminal commands modifying XML files.

integrity.description: The telemetry plot was generated from an actual flight simulation within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The plot window matches the OpenRocket interface style and shows realistic flight data curves, not a generic or downloaded image.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the correct application (OpenRocket) to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application interface is clearly visible and used for the 3D rendering and simulation tasks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source file is 'NDRT_Rocket_2020.ork'. The target updated design file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/pr_rocket.ork'. The telemetry plot must be saved as a PDF to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/telemetry_plot.pdf'. The photorealistic render must be a 1920x1080 PNG saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/rocket_render.png'. The pass threshold for the task is 70 points.
